title: draggable.DragZone: fire events on itself when drop related events arrive
manager.DomEvent: forward drop, drop:enter & drop:leave events to the related drag zone
main.addon.DragDrop: add a boolean "isDrop" flag to the drag:end event
main.addon.DragDrop: onDragEnd() => send a drop event to the app worker
main.addon.DragDrop: drop:enter, drop:leave => pass the dragZoneId to the app worker
main.addon.DragDrop: forward the new drop:enter & drop:leave events to the App worker
main.addon.DragDrop: onMouseEnter(), onMouseLeave() => check if the event path matches the dropZoneIdentifier
main.addon.DragDrop: subscribe to the new main.DomEvents mouseEnter & mouseLeave events
main.DomEvents: fire custom main thread events for mouseenter & mouseleave
